summary: Comprehensive Phase 2 testing completed successfully - Socratic Tutor interface fully functional. Backend APIs (20/20 passed), frontend Practice Modal integration working, and Teacher Dashboard displaying real-time error patterns and mastery updates. Mock LLM evaluation provides realistic Socratic hints and error classification.
passed_tests: All 20 backend API endpoints working correctly (100% success rate)
Phase 2 tutor endpoints: /api/tutor/problem/{node_id} returns math problems correctly
Phase 2 tutor endpoints: /api/tutor/evaluate processes student responses with Socratic hints
Phase 2 tutor endpoints: /api/tutor/chat-history available for message tracking
Practice Modal opens when clicking Open/Approaching island nodes (via detail modal workflow)
Problem loads and displays correctly in Practice Modal
Chat input accepts student messages with proper data-testid attributes
Mock LLM evaluation classifies errors into 5 patterns: CONCEPTUAL, PROCEDURAL, CARELESS, VOCABULARY, PREREQ_GAP
Tutor responses include Socratic hints based on error patterns
Database updates mastery scores (accuracy, fluency, composite) after each interaction
Teacher Dashboard displays real-time error pattern badges for all students
Teacher Dashboard shows updated session counts and anxiety flags
Error patterns visible: Jordan shows PREREQ_GAP, CONCEPTUAL, PROCEDURAL badges
Anxiety flags working: Sam Careful displays 36 anxiety flags
Get a Hint button triggers help request functionality
New Problem button loads different problems from the bank
All modal interactions use proper data-testid selectors for testing

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (Practice Modal workflow confirmed, all components functional)
